muscle.title: Muscle Mass Assessment
muscle.subtitle: Enter SMM. Save to exterior axis.
muscle.smmHint: Uses weight, age, and sex from Home. Norm tables ~10–80; profile starts 13, max 80.

standardsInfo.p1: SMM is muscle mass from body-composition devices (BIA, scans). Enter device reading — no photo or height estimation here.
standardsInfo.p2: SM% = SMM ÷ body weight × 100 (Home weight). SMM and SM% answer different questions; both branches reduce one-sided readings.
standardsInfo.p3: Each branch scores against age/sex norm tables (0–100 decile anchors). Linear interpolation between anchors; damped extension above top anchor. Profile age 13–80 required.
standardsInfo.p4: Radar exterior axis = arithmetic mean of SMM score and SM% score. Preview matches saved value.
standardsInfo.p5: Max SMM input by sex (four-sovereign ceiling above) is a scoring guardrail, not medical judgment. Recheck device calibration if readings exceed cap.
standardsInfo.dualSovereignPreamble: The scoring ceiling for skeletal muscle mass is calibrated at {{maleMax}} kg for males and {{femaleMax}} kg for females, honoring the ultimate legends on Earth:
standardsInfo.dualSovereignMale: [Male {{max}} kg Dual Legends] 1) Absolute Mass Ceiling: Hafthor Bjornsson (The Mountain, WSM Champion, possessing the non-human absolute total muscle mass under the heaviest skeletal chassis); 2) Pure Muscle Density Ceiling: Ronnie Coleman (8-time Mr. Olympia, the absolute physiological limit of packing extraordinary shredded skeletal muscle into a standard frame at near-zero body fat).
standardsInfo.dualSovereignFemale: [Female {{max}} kg Dual Goddesses] 1) Absolute Mass Goddess: Nataliya Kuznetsova ("Russian Amazonka", IFBB Pro), the heaviest and most extremely muscular professional female bodybuilder in history; 2) Pure Muscle Density Goddess: Iris Kyle (10-time Ms. Olympia Champion), record-holder for stacking pure skeletal muscle to the physiological limit at extremely low body fat).

muscle.submitDone: Saved — Home radar and merged scores use this exterior axis.
muscle.profileIncompleteHint: Complete Home profile (sex, age, height, weight) for muscle scoring.

errors.missing-profile: Complete physical profile on Home first.
errors.age-out-of-range: No muscle norm for this age (through 80). Check profile age.
errors.smm-exceeds-ceilingMale: SMM above model ceiling ({{max}} kg). Ceiling honors Hafthor Bjornsson (mass) and Ronnie Coleman (density). Enter {{max}} kg or lower — recheck device if unexpected.
errors.smm-exceeds-ceilingFemale: SMM above model ceiling ({{max}} kg). Ceiling honors Nataliya Kuznetsova (mass) and Iris Kyle (density). Enter {{max}} kg or lower — recheck device if unexpected.
errors.standards-not-found: Could not resolve norm rows — verify age and sex on Home.
